_README: Hand-curated greener-swap products. Add your researched products to the 'products' array below. These are merged into the swap engine and RANKED FIRST (above the built-in catalog). Required fields: barcode, name, category. Everything else is optional.

_fields.barcode: (required) The exact Open Food Facts barcode, e.g. "8717703716115". Used to pull the live image, eco-score and CO2.
_fields.name: (required) Display name, e.g. "Tony's Chocolonely Milk".
_fields.category: (required) One of: chocolate, candy, chips, cookies, spreads, snack_bars, cereal, coffee, tea, soft_drinks, milk, yogurt, cheese, ice_cream, eggs, seafood, bananas.
_fields.brand: (optional) Brand shown on the card. Defaults to 'name' if omitted.
_fields.certifications: (optional) Any of: b_corp, fair_trade, organic, rainforest_alliance, msc, asc, certified_humane, animal_welfare_approved, gap_rated, regenerative_organic, climate_neutral, worker_coop, direct_trade.
_fields.strengths: (optional) Up to ~3 short reasons, e.g. ["Slavery-free cocoa", "Fairtrade certified"].
_fields.addresses: (optional) Which concerns it fixes: any of labor, boycott, animal_welfare, eco. Defaults to all four.
_fields.markets: (optional) ISO-2 country codes where it's sold, e.g. ["GB","US"]. Omit to mean 'available everywhere'.
